scripts.build: npm run build -w @snz-rodoved/shared && npm run build -w @snz-rodoved/db && npm run build -w @snz-rodoved/api && npm run build -w @snz-rodoved/web
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @snz-rodoved/shared && npm run build -w @snz-rodoved/db && concurrently "npm:dev:api" "npm:dev:web"
scripts.test: npm run build -w @snz-rodoved/shared && npm run build -w @snz-rodoved/db && npm run test -w @snz-rodoved/shared && npm run test -w @snz-rodoved/db && npm run test -w @snz-rodoved/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @snz-rodoved/shared && npm run build -w @snz-rodoved/db && npm run typecheck -w @snz-rodoved/shared && npm run typecheck -w @snz-rodoved/db && npm run typecheck -w @snz-rodoved/api && npm run typecheck -w @snz-rodoved/web
